editionTitle: IB ACIO Daily Current Affairs — 20 July 2026
editionTitle_hi: आईबी एसीआईओ दैनिक करेंट अफेयर्स — 20 जुलाई 2026

articles.title: International Moon Day — 20 July
articles.summary: International Moon Day (20 July) commemorates the Apollo 11 Moon landing (1969) and promotes peaceful lunar exploration.
articles.summary_hi: अंतर्राष्ट्रीय चंद्र दिवस (20 जुलाई) Apollo 11 चंद्र लैंडिंग (1969) का स्मरण — शांतिपूर्ण चंद्र अन्वेषण।
articles.content:
International Moon Day is observed on 20 July. It marks the first human landing on the Moon by NASA’s Apollo 11 mission on 20 July 1969. Neil Armstrong and Buzz Aldrin walked on the lunar surface; Michael Collins orbited in the command module.

The UN General Assembly declared International Moon Day in 2021 to promote sustainable and peaceful lunar exploration.

India’s Chandrayaan programme (especially Chandrayaan-3 soft landing near the south pole in 2023) makes this day highly relevant for exam aspirants.

For IB ACIO: date (20 July), Apollo 11 (1969), and UN declaration (2021) — link with Chandrayaan-3.
articles.content_hi:
20 जुलाई — Apollo 11 (1969) चंद्र लैंडिंग। Neil Armstrong, Buzz Aldrin।

UN ने 2021 में International Moon Day घोषित। भारत: Chandrayaan-3 (2023)।

IB ACIO: 20 July, 1969, 2021 — याद रखें।
articles.question: International Moon Day is observed on which date?
articles.question_hi: अंतर्राष्ट्रीय चंद्र दिवस किस तिथि को मनाया जाता है?
articles.explanation: International Moon Day is observed on 20 July to mark the Apollo 11 landing in 1969.
articles.explanation_hi: Apollo 11 (1969) की याद में 20 जुलाई को International Moon Day मनाया जाता है।
articles.moreInfo: Related: Chandrayaan-3 (8 July edition). World Space Week starts 4 October.
articles.moreInfo_hi: संबंधित: Chandrayaan-3 (8 जुलाई)। World Space Week: 4 अक्टूबर से।

articles.title: World Chess Day — 20 July
articles.summary: World Chess Day (20 July) marks the founding of FIDE in 1924 and celebrates chess as a sport of strategy and education.
articles.summary_hi: विश्व शतरंज दिवस (20 जुलाई) FIDE की स्थापना 1924 को चिह्नित — रणनीति और शिक्षा का खेल।
articles.content:
World Chess Day is observed on 20 July, the date of the establishment of the International Chess Federation (FIDE) in Paris in 1924. The UN recognised World Chess Day in 2019.

Chess is widely promoted for cognitive skills. India has emerged as a chess powerhouse — Viswanathan Anand (multiple World Champion), Gukesh Dommaraju (World Champion 2024), and the historic double gold at the 2024 Chess Olympiad in Budapest.

FIDE governs world chess rankings and championships. Headquarters is in Lausanne, Switzerland.

For IB ACIO: 20 July, FIDE 1924, UN recognition 2019, and India’s recent chess achievements.
articles.content_hi:
20 जुलाई — FIDE स्थापना 1924, Paris। UN मान्यता 2019।

भारत: Anand, Gukesh (2024 World Champion), Budapest Olympiad double gold।

IB ACIO: 20 July, FIDE 1924 — याद रखें।
articles.question: World Chess Day commemorates the founding of which organisation?
articles.question_hi: विश्व शतरंज दिवस किस संगठन की स्थापना को चिह्नित करता है?
articles.explanation: World Chess Day marks the founding of FIDE on 20 July 1924.
articles.explanation_hi: विश्व शतरंज दिवस 20 जुलाई 1924 को FIDE की स्थापना को चिह्नित करता है।
articles.moreInfo: Related: Chess Olympiad double gold article (15 July edition).

articles.title: Chandrayaan-3 — India’s Soft Landing Near Lunar South Pole
articles.title_hi: चंद्रयान-3 — चंद्र दक्षिण ध्रुव के पास सॉफ्ट लैंडिंग
articles.summary: Chandrayaan-3 made India the first nation to soft-land near the Moon’s south pole (23 August 2023) — lander Vikram and rover Pragyan.
articles.summary_hi: चंद्रयान-3 ने भारत को चंद्र दक्षिण ध्रुव के पास सॉफ्ट लैंडिंग वाला पहला देश बनाया (23 अगस्त 2023) — Vikram व Pragyan।
articles.content:
Chandrayaan-3 was launched by ISRO on 14 July 2023 aboard LVM3 (GSLV Mk III). On 23 August 2023, the Vikram lander soft-landed near the lunar south pole; rover Pragyan conducted surface experiments.

India became the fourth country to soft-land on the Moon (after USA, USSR, China) and the first to land near the south pole. The mission demonstrated landing and roving capability after Chandrayaan-2’s landing setback.

National Space Day is observed in India on 23 August to mark this success.

For IB ACIO: launch 14 July 2023, landing 23 Aug 2023, Vikram/Pragyan, LVM3, National Space Day.
articles.content_hi:
Chandrayaan-3: 14 जुलाई 2023 launch (LVM3)। 23 अगस्त 2023 landing — Vikram, Pragyan।

पहला south pole soft landing। National Space Day: 23 अगस्त।

IB ACIO: 23 Aug 2023, Vikram/Pragyan — याद रखें।
articles.question: India observes National Space Day on which date?
articles.question_hi: भारत राष्ट्रीय अंतरिक्ष दिवस किस तिथि को मनाता है?
articles.explanation: National Space Day is observed on 23 August to mark Chandrayaan-3’s landing.
articles.explanation_hi: Chandrayaan-3 लैंडिंग की याद में 23 अगस्त को National Space Day मनाया जाता है।
articles.moreInfo: Today is also International Moon Day — perfect pairing with Chandrayaan-3 revision.
articles.moreInfo_hi: आज International Moon Day भी है — Chandrayaan-3 रिवीजन के लिए उपयुक्त।

articles.title: Official Language — Article 343 and Eighth Schedule
articles.summary: Article 343 makes Hindi in Devanagari script the official language of the Union. The Eighth Schedule lists scheduled languages of India.
articles.summary_hi: धारा 343 संघ की राजभाषा देवनागरी में हिंदी। आठवीं अनुसूची में भारत की अनुसूचित भाषाएं।
articles.content:
Article 343 of the Constitution provides that the official language of the Union shall be Hindi in Devanagari script. English continues for official purposes as provided by law (Official Languages Act, 1963).

The Eighth Schedule originally listed 14 languages; after amendments it has 22 scheduled languages (including Sindhi, Konkani, Manipuri, Nepali, Bodo, Dogri, Maithili, Santhali, etc.).

Classical language status is a separate recognition by the Government of India (e.g., Tamil, Sanskrit, Kannada, Telugu, Malayalam, Odia, and more recently others).

For IB ACIO: Article 343, Eighth Schedule (22 languages), and Official Languages Act 1963.
articles.content_hi:
धारा 343: संघ की राजभाषा हिंदी (देवनागरी)। Official Languages Act 1963।

आठवीं अनुसूची: 22 भाषाएं। Classical language अलग मान्यता।

IB ACIO: 343, 22 भाषाएं — याद रखें।
articles.question: How many languages are currently listed in the Eighth Schedule?
articles.question_hi: आठवीं अनुसूची में वर्तमान में कितनी भाषाएं सूचीबद्ध हैं?
articles.explanation: The Eighth Schedule currently lists 22 scheduled languages of India.
articles.explanation_hi: आठवीं अनुसूची में वर्तमान में 22 अनुसूचित भाषाएं हैं।
articles.moreInfo: Related: Fundamental Duties include valuing composite culture; Preamble ideals.
articles.moreInfo_hi: संबंधित: मौलिक कर्तव्य — समग्र संस्कृति का सम्मान।

articles.title: National Health Mission (NHM) — NRHM + NUHM
articles.summary: NHM is India’s flagship health programme combining National Rural Health Mission and National Urban Health Mission under MoHFW.
articles.summary_hi: NHM भारत का प्रमुख स्वास्थ्य कार्यक्रम — NRHM + NUHM, स्वास्थ्य एवं परिवार कल्याण मंत्रालय।
articles.content:
The National Health Mission (NHM) subsumes the National Rural Health Mission (NRHM, launched 2005) and the National Urban Health Mission (NUHM). It is implemented by the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare.

Focus areas: maternal and child health, immunisation, communicable/non-communicable diseases, health system strengthening, and ASHAs (Accredited Social Health Activists) at the community level.

Ayushman Bharat complements NHM with Health and Wellness Centres (AB-HWCs) and PM-JAY insurance coverage.

For IB ACIO: NRHM 2005, NHM = NRHM + NUHM, ASHA workers, and link to Ayushman Bharat.
articles.content_hi:
NHM = NRHM (2005) + NUHM। MoHFW।

ASHA, मातृ-शिशु स्वास्थ्य, टीकाकरण। Ayushman Bharat पूरक।

IB ACIO: NRHM 2005, ASHA — याद रखें।
articles.question: National Rural Health Mission (NRHM) was launched in which year?
articles.question_hi: राष्ट्रीय ग्रामीण स्वास्थ्य मिशन (NRHM) किस वर्ष शुरू हुआ?
articles.explanation: NRHM was launched in 2005 and later became part of the broader National Health Mission.
articles.explanation_hi: NRHM 2005 में शुरू हुआ और बाद में NHM का हिस्सा बना।

articles.title: Repo Rate vs Reverse Repo Rate — Basics
articles.title_hi: Repo Rate बनाम Reverse Repo Rate — मूल बातें
articles.summary: Repo rate is the rate at which RBI lends to banks; reverse repo is the rate at which RBI absorbs liquidity from banks.
articles.summary_hi: Repo: RBI बैंकों को उधार देने की दर। Reverse repo: RBI बैंकों से तरलता लेने की दर।
articles.content:
The repo rate is the policy rate at which the Reserve Bank of India lends short-term money to commercial banks against securities. A higher repo rate makes borrowing costlier and can cool inflation.

The reverse repo rate is the rate at which RBI borrows from banks (absorbs excess liquidity). The Standing Deposit Facility (SDF) has also become an important floor for the liquidity corridor.

These rates are decided by the Monetary Policy Committee (MPC). CRR and SLR are separate statutory reserve requirements.

For IB ACIO: repo (RBI lends), reverse repo (RBI absorbs), and MPC sets the policy rate.
articles.content_hi:
Repo: RBI → बैंकों को उधार। Reverse repo: बैंक → RBI (तरलता अवशोषण)।

MPC तय करती है। CRR/SLR अलग।

IB ACIO: repo vs reverse repo — याद रखें।
articles.question: At which rate does RBI lend money to commercial banks against securities?
articles.question_hi: RBI प्रतिभूतियों के बदले वाणिज्यिक बैंकों को किस दर पर उधार देता है?
articles.explanation: Repo rate is the rate at which RBI lends to banks against collateral securities.
articles.explanation_hi: Repo rate वह दर है जिस पर RBI बैंकों को प्रतिभूतियों के बदले उधार देता है।
articles.moreInfo: Related: MPC inflation targeting (17 July edition).

articles.title: Akash Missile — Indigenous Surface-to-Air System
articles.title_hi: आकाश मिसाइल — स्वदेशी सतह से हवा प्रणाली
articles.summary: Akash is an indigenously developed medium-range surface-to-air missile system by DRDO, inducted by the Indian Army and Air Force.
articles.summary_hi: आकाश DRDO द्वारा विकसित मध्यम दूरी की सतह से हवा मिसाइल — थलसेना और वायुसेना में शामिल।
articles.content:
Akash is a medium-range surface-to-air missile (SAM) developed by DRDO and produced with Bharat Dynamics Limited (BDL) and other Indian partners.

It can engage multiple aerial targets including aircraft and drones. Range is typically cited around 25–45 km depending on variant (Akash, Akash-NG developments).

Akash demonstrates India’s push for indigenous air defence alongside imports like S-400 and systems such as MRSAM (India–Israel).

For IB ACIO: developer (DRDO), type (SAM), and indigenous air defence example.
articles.content_hi:
आकाश: DRDO SAM, BDL उत्पादन। विमान/ड्रोन लक्ष्य।

स्वदेशी वायु रक्षा उदाहरण — S-400 (आयात) से तुलना।

IB ACIO: DRDO, SAM — याद रखें।
articles.question: Akash missile system was developed by which organisation?
articles.question_hi: आकाश मिसाइल प्रणाली किस संगठन द्वारा विकसित?
articles.explanation: Akash is an indigenous SAM system developed by DRDO.
articles.explanation_hi: आकाश DRDO द्वारा विकसित स्वदेशी SAM प्रणाली है।
articles.moreInfo: Related: S-400 (14 July), BrahMos (15 July), Agni-Prime (9 July).

articles.title: G20 — India as Host and Global South Voice
articles.title_hi: G20 — भारत की मेज़बानी और Global South आवाज़
articles.summary: G20 is the premier forum for international economic cooperation. India hosted the 2023 summit in New Delhi under the theme ‘Vasudhaiva Kutumbakam’.
articles.summary_hi: G20 अंतर्राष्ट्रीय आर्थिक सहयोग का प्रमुख मंच। भारत ने 2023 शिखर नई दिल्ली में ‘वसुधैव कुटुम्बकम्’ थीम से आयोजित किया।
articles.content:
The G20 comprises 19 countries and the European Union (African Union became a permanent member later). It accounts for the bulk of global GDP and population.

India held the G20 Presidency in 2023; the New Delhi Leaders’ Summit adopted the New Delhi Declaration. Theme: ‘Vasudhaiva Kutumbakam — One Earth, One Family, One Future’.

Key outcomes associated with India’s presidency include the African Union’s permanent membership and focus on Global South development priorities.

For IB ACIO: India host 2023, AU permanent member, and Vasudhaiva Kutumbakam theme.
articles.content_hi:
G20: 19 देश + EU (+ African Union स्थायी सदस्य)। भारत अध्यक्षता 2023, नई दिल्ली।

थीम: वसुधैव कुटुम्बकम्। New Delhi Declaration।

IB ACIO: 2023 host, AU membership — याद रखें।
articles.question: India hosted the G20 Leaders’ Summit in which year?
articles.question_hi: भारत ने G20 लीडर्स समिट किस वर्ष आयोजित की?
articles.explanation: India hosted the G20 Leaders’ Summit in New Delhi in 2023.
articles.explanation_hi: भारत ने 2023 में नई दिल्ली में G20 लीडर्स समिट की मेज़बानी की।
articles.moreInfo: Related: African Union G20 membership (9 July), IMEC at G20 (10 July).
articles.moreInfo_hi: संबंधित: AU G20 सदस्यता, IMEC (पहले संस्करण)।

articles.title: World Nature Conservation Day — 28 July (Preview)
articles.summary: World Nature Conservation Day (28 July) stresses protecting flora, fauna, and natural resources for sustainable living.
articles.summary_hi: विश्व प्रकृति संरक्षण दिवस (28 जुलाई) वनस्पति, जीव व प्राकृतिक संसाधन संरक्षण पर जोर।
articles.content:
World Nature Conservation Day is observed on 28 July to raise awareness about protecting the natural environment and conserving resources for future generations.

It often coincides in the same week with World Hepatitis Day (also 28 July) — aspirants should not confuse the two. International Tiger Day follows on 29 July.

India’s conservation framework includes Wildlife Protection Act 1972, Project Tiger, Project Elephant, Protected Areas (National Parks, Wildlife Sanctuaries, Biosphere Reserves), and Ramsar wetlands.

For IB ACIO: 28 July (Nature Conservation), distinguish from Hepatitis Day (same date), Tiger Day 29 July.
articles.content_hi:
28 जुलाई — World Nature Conservation Day। उसी दिन World Hepatitis Day भी।

29 जुलाई — International Tiger Day। Wildlife Protection Act 1972।

IB ACIO: तिथियां भ्रमित न करें — याद रखें।
articles.question: World Nature Conservation Day is observed on:
articles.question_hi: विश्व प्रकृति संरक्षण दिवस कब मनाया जाता है?
articles.explanation: World Nature Conservation Day is observed on 28 July each year.
articles.explanation_hi: विश्व प्रकृति संरक्षण दिवस हर वर्ष 28 जुलाई को मनाया जाता है।
articles.moreInfo: 5 June = World Environment Day. 29 July = International Tiger Day.
articles.moreInfo_hi: 5 जून = विश्व पर्यावरण दिवस। 29 जुलाई = अंतर्राष्ट्रीय बाघ दिवस।

articles.title: Right to Education — Article 21A
articles.summary: Article 21A (86th Amendment, 2002) makes free and compulsory education a Fundamental Right for children aged 6–14; RTE Act 2009 gives effect to it.
articles.summary_hi: धारा 21A (86वां संशोधन, 2002) 6–14 वर्ष बच्चों के लिए मुफ्त अनिवार्य शिक्षा मौलिक अधिकार — RTE अधिनियम 2009।
articles.content:
The 86th Constitutional Amendment Act, 2002 inserted Article 21A — the State shall provide free and compulsory education to all children of the age of six to fourteen years.

The Right of Children to Free and Compulsory Education (RTE) Act, 2009 operationalises this right. It mandates 25% reservation in private unaided schools for disadvantaged groups (Section 12(1)(c)), neighbourhood schools, and norms for teachers and infrastructure.

The same 86th Amendment also added the 11th Fundamental Duty on education of children (Article 51A).

For IB ACIO: Article 21A, 86th Amendment (2002), RTE Act 2009, age 6–14.
articles.content_hi:
धारा 21A, 86वां संशोधन 2002। RTE अधिनियम 2009। आयु 6–14।

निजी स्कूलों में 25% आरक्षण (धारा 12(1)(c))। 11वां मौलिक कर्तव्य भी।

IB ACIO: 21A, 2009 RTE — याद रखें।
articles.question: Article 21A was inserted by which Constitutional Amendment?
articles.question_hi: धारा 21A किस संवैधानिक संशोधन द्वारा जोड़ी गई?
articles.explanation: The 86th Amendment Act, 2002 inserted Article 21A making education a Fundamental Right for ages 6–14.
articles.explanation_hi: 86वें संशोधन अधिनियम, 2002 ने धारा 21A जोड़ी — 6–14 वर्ष शिक्षा मौलिक अधिकार।
articles.moreInfo: Related: NEP 2020 (14 July), Fundamental Duties (18 July).
